name: Composio
description: Access 1000+ third-party tools via Composio (Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Notion, etc.)

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Composio integration

consumerKey.description: Your Composio consumer key (ck_...) from dashboard.composio.dev/settings

apiKey.description: Your Composio API key (ak_...) for backend API / tool router endpoints. Use instead of consumerKey for per-user support.

mcpUrl.description: Composio MCP server URL (default: https://connect.composio.dev/mcp). For per-user: use a tool router URL.

userId.description: Per-user identifier for scoping connected accounts. Appended as ?user_id= when using apiKey.

enabled.label: Enable Composio
enabled.help: Enable or disable the Composio integration

consumerKey.label: Consumer Key
consumerKey.help: Your Composio consumer key (ck_...) from dashboard.composio.dev/settings

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Your Composio API key (ak_...) for per-user tool router sessions

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Per-user identifier for scoping connected accounts
